steps.title: Use two points on the line
steps.content:
From the line of best fit, use two approximate points on the line, such as $(0{,}72)$ and $(6{,}126)$. The slope is

$$\frac{126-72}{6-0}=9$$

steps.title: Predict the value at three years
steps.content:
The line has an approximate intercept of $72$ and slope $9$. At $x=3$, the predicted body length is

$$72+9(3)=99$$

steps.title: Round to the nearest ten
steps.content: The question asks for the nearest $10$ centimeters. The value $99$ rounds to $100$. The answer is 100.
